planned_textbooks.note: Deferred: OpenStax University Physics ships as 3 volumes that each restart chapter numbering, so it needs a per-volume modeling decision AND verified per-volume TOCs. Only Volume 2 was fully verifiable from static sources on 2026-07-07; not shipping a partially-guessed TOC (Michael's no-known-wrong-results rule). Acquire complete per-volume TOCs and add as openstax-university-physics-v{1,2,3}.

Deferred alongside University Physics: single-volume, so simpler, but the full chapter list was not verified from a static source on 2026-07-07. Acquire and add. Big adoption lever once present (OpenStax is free/openly licensed).
